item.title: Example Talk
item.description:
Note

Click on the Slides button above to view the built-in slides feature.

Slides can be added in a few ways:

  • Create slides using Hugo Blox Builder’s feature and link using slides parameter in the front matter of the talk file
  • Upload an existing slide deck to static/ and link using url_slides parameter in the front matter of the talk file
  • Embed your slides (e.g. Google Slides) or presentation video on this page using .

Further event details, including such as image galleries, can be added to the body of this page.

item.title: Beyond Boundaries: Collaboration Networks and Research Output in Brazilian Computer Science
A Mapping of Recording-based Game Test Automation Tools
item.description: 9th International Workshop on Games and Software Engineering - Co-located with ICSE 2025, Ottawa, Canada, 2025.

item.title: Social Network Analysis
item.description:
I started this undergraduate research project in 2021 by studying the paper , the authors and were my advisors.

Now, as my final project for the BSc. in CS, I am researching about paper. The motivation for this study came from classes of the offered by Stanford University.

Advisors

  • , PhD

Experiments

item.title: ADEGA: Análise de Dados Estatísticos da Grade Acadêmica
item.description: This paper was published in Portuguese (BR). Análise de Dados Estatísticos da Grade Acadêmica (ADEGA).
